data_source: NVIDIA FY2026 Q4 earnings release (Form 8-K / investor.nvidia.com), condensed financials as of Jan 25, 2026

notes: FY2026 and FY2025 are twelve months ended Jan 25, 2026 and Jan 26, 2025.
SG&A is reported as a single line; sm_expense carries the full SG&A and ga_expense is 0 for modeling.
Pretax and tax are from the condensed consolidated statement of income in the earnings materials.

cash_flow.label: FY2026
cash_flow.note: FCF per company definition: operating cash flow less PPE/intangible purchases and related principal payments.

guidance_highlights.china_datacenter_assumption: Outlook assumes no Data Center compute revenue from China.

stock_data.ref_note: Optional price deck not used in this template run.

notes: Revenue $215.9B and net income $120.1B align with NVIDIA press release tables (rounded in narrative).
Balance sheet equity and assets from the same condensed statements in the FY2026 Q4 materials.
